notes: With-skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 3 evals vs. 38% baseline — skill is strongly differentiating
Baseline consistently passes 'has analogy', 'jargon-free terms', and 'chunk limit' — these 3 assertions are non-discriminating (Claude does them naturally)
Baseline consistently fails 'visual', 'analogy boundary', 'curated links', 'layered structure' — these are the skill's main value-add
Skill adds ~215s average execution time (4-6x slower) and ~25k tokens — the cost is real but explained by web search + visual generation
tldraw MCP timed out in all 3 with-skill runs; skill fell back to Mermaid diagrams. tldraw code was saved but not rendered.
